criteriaResults.evidence: File meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats exists. Line 5 contains: load 'helpers/test-helper'
Lines 7-25 define setup() which calls source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' at line 24, before any @test blocks.

Test 'init_harness_state: creates config.json with correct userPrompt and projectType' (lines 31-37) calls init_harness_state with args and asserts config.json has correct .userPrompt and .projectType. Test passes (ok 35 in TAP output).
Test 'init_harness_state: creates all required files' (lines 39-46) verifies all four files exist: config.json, cost-log.json, regression/registry.json, progress.md. Test passes (ok 36).
Test at lines 48-56 asserts invocations array length is 0 and totalCost is '0'. Test passes (ok 37).
Test at lines 58-66 asserts sprints object length is 0 and lastFullRun is 'null'. Test passes (ok 38).
Test at lines 68-73 calls init_harness_state with 'Build a REST API', then greps progress.md for the prompt and 'opus'. Test passes (ok 39).
Test at lines 75-89 sets MODEL=sonnet, CONTEXT_STRATEGY=continue, MAX_SPRINT_ATTEMPTS=5, COST_CAP_PER_SPRINT=50.00, TOTAL_COST_CAP=500.00, then asserts all values in config.json. Test passes (ok 40).

Test at lines 91-99 unsets env vars in setup(), calls init_harness_state, and asserts defaults: model=opus, contextStrategy=reset, maxSprintAttempts=3, costCapPerSprint=25.00, totalCostCap=200.00. All match source code defaults at utils.sh:78-84. Test passes (ok 41).

Test at lines 105-116 initializes cost-log.json, calls log_cost 'generator' 2 with usage JSON (input_tokens: 1500, output_tokens: 800), then asserts .invocations[0] has correct role, sprint, inputTokens, outputTokens. Test passes (ok 42).
Test at lines 118-125 calls log_cost with '{}' (no usage fields) and asserts inputTokens=0 and outputTokens=0. Test passes (ok 43).
Test at lines 127-137 calls log_cost 3 times and asserts invocations array length is 3. Test passes (ok 44).
Test at lines 143-151 installs sprint-plan-3sprint.json fixture, calls update_progress 1 'PASS' 1 '', then greps for 'Foundation Setup' (sprint name from fixture). Test passes (ok 45).
Test at lines 153-161 calls update_progress 2 'PASS' 2 '' and asserts progress.md contains '**Status**: PASS' and '**Attempt**: 2'. Test passes (ok 46).
Test at lines 163-169 calls update_progress with merge_sha 'abc123def456' and greps for it in progress.md. Test passes (ok 47).
Test at lines 172-179 calls update_progress with empty merge_sha and asserts 'Merge commit' does NOT appear in progress.md using negated grep. Test passes (ok 48).
Test at lines 185-196 ensures handoff.json does not exist (rm -f), calls update_handoff 1, then asserts the file was created with completedSprints, currentSprint, and git fields. Test passes (ok 49).
Test at lines 198-206 calls update_handoff 1, then asserts .completedSprints contains 1 via jq index check. Test passes (ok 50).
Test at lines 208-213 calls update_handoff 3, then asserts .currentSprint equals 4. Test passes (ok 51).
Test at lines 216-223 calls update_handoff with tag 'harness/sprint-01/pass' and SHA 'merge-sha-abc', then asserts .git.latestTag and .git.latestMergeSha match. Test passes (ok 52).
Test at lines 225-233 calls update_handoff with sprint 1 twice, then counts occurrences of 1 in completedSprints and asserts exactly 1. Test passes (ok 53).

Test at lines 236-267 creates handoff.json with custom fields (projectName='My Custom Project', techStack.runtime='node', devServerCommand='npm start', etc.), calls update_handoff, then asserts all pre-existing fields remain intact. Test passes (ok 54).

Test at lines 273-292 installs contract-3criteria.json fixture, calls update_regression_registry 1, then asserts registry has sprint entry with criteria 'C1-01,C1-02,C1-03' and correct contractPath. Test passes (ok 55).
Test at lines 294-303 calls update_regression_registry without any contract file and asserts registry sprints length is 0. Test passes (ok 56).
Test at lines 305-317 creates empty contract file via touch, calls update_regression_registry, and asserts registry unchanged (sprints length 0). Test passes (ok 57).
Test at lines 319-331 installs contract-empty-criteria.json fixture (empty criteria array), calls update_regression_registry, and asserts sprint entry has criteria length 0. Test passes (ok 58).
Full test suite run via 'bash meta-tests/run.sh' exits with code 0. All 58 tests pass (including all 24 state management tests). TAP output shows ok 35-58 for test-utils-state.bats.

All 24 @test names in test-utils-state.bats follow the 'function_name: description' pattern. Functions tested: init_harness_state (7 tests), log_cost (3 tests), update_progress (4 tests), update_handoff (6 tests), update_regression_registry (4 tests).

Sprint 1 regression: all 8 test-infrastructure.bats tests pass (ok 1-8 in TAP output). run.sh discovers all 3 .bats files including the new test-utils-state.bats. No sprint 1 files were modified (confirmed via git diff).

Sprint 2 regression: all 26 test-utils-pure.bats tests pass (ok 9-34 in TAP output). Covers slugify (9 tests), sprint_pad (4), sprint_dir (3), json_read (6), file_exists (4). No sprint 2 files were modified (confirmed via git diff).

regressionResults.sprint1: PASS - All 8 infrastructure tests pass. No sprint 1 files modified.
regressionResults.sprint2: PASS - All 26 pure function tests pass. No sprint 2 files modified.

correctness.notes: All 24 new state management tests pass. Tests correctly validate init_harness_state, log_cost, update_progress, update_handoff, and update_regression_registry. Test assertions accurately match the source code behavior in harness/lib/utils.sh.

completeness.notes: Every function listed in the sprint scope is covered: init_harness_state (7 tests covering creation, defaults, env var overrides), log_cost (3 tests covering normal, missing fields, accumulation), update_progress (4 tests covering sprint name, status/attempt, merge SHA presence/absence), update_handoff (6 tests covering creation, completedSprints, currentSprint, git fields, idempotency, field preservation), update_regression_registry (4 tests covering normal, missing contract, empty contract, empty criteria).

codeQuality.notes: Clean, well-organized test file with clear section headers. Consistent naming convention. Proper use of setup() with env var clearing. Good use of helper functions (assert_json_field, install_fixture). Minor note: the setup() overrides the test-helper's setup() rather than calling it, which duplicates some logic, but this is a valid bats pattern and works correctly since teardown() is inherited.

testing.notes: This IS the test deliverable. Tests are thorough, covering happy paths, edge cases (missing files, empty files, missing fields), idempotency, and field preservation. Each test is isolated via temp directories.

ux.notes: Test names are descriptive and follow consistent convention. TAP output is clear. Tests run quickly (2-3 seconds for all 58 tests). Fixture-based testing is clean and maintainable.

notes: Sprint 3 is a clean, complete implementation. All 30 criteria pass including 24 new state management tests and 2 regression checks. The test file is well-structured with clear section separators, consistent naming, and thorough coverage of all five state management functions. No modifications were made to sprint 1 or sprint 2 deliverables. The full suite of 58 tests runs in under 3 seconds.
